name: Browser-Local Audio Listening History
required_commit_title: Release 219: add browser-local audio listening history

data/read-aloud-playlist.json.reason: Existing unmodified verified-text device read-aloud playlist.

assets/js/media-session-player.js.reason: Existing player emits the live status text observed after SpeechSynthesisUtterance onstart.

limitations: History remains in the current browser profile and is not synchronized.
The feature records actual starts, not trustworthy listening duration or completion.
Device speech quality depends on the installed browser and Tamil voice.
GitHub Actions and deployed production validation remain pending until commit and deployment.
